title: Glues & Fillers 10039 151 Crack Attack All Purpose Filler, White , 151 Grams , Pack of 1
features: READY TO USE: 151 Crack Attack Filler, ready to use, perfect for filling most household materials including plaster, wood, brickwork, metal, stone & concrete.

QUICK, READY MIXED ALL PURPOSE DIY FILLER: 151 All Purpose Filler, resists shrinking, suitable for inside and outside repairs. 151 Crack Attack gives a super smooth finish and only needs light sanding before painting.
DIY CARTRIDGE: 151 Crack Attack cartridge fits standard DIY cartridge caulking guns
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use Crack Attack Filler. Store at room temperature
